description: Configure NextGen Connect's server-level global scripts via the REST API (PUT https://localhost:8443/api/server/globalScripts) to implement a system-wide message audit trail. Use Basic Auth (admin/admin) and the header X-Requested-With: OpenAPI. The Deploy script must initialize 'systemStartTime' and 'auditMessageCount' (set to 0) in the globalMap and log 'AUDIT_DEPLOY: Global audit trail initialized'. The Undeploy script must log 'AUDIT_UNDEPLOY: Global audit trail finalized'. The Preprocessor script must add an 'auditReceivedTimestamp' (ISO string) and a random UUID 'auditTraceId' to the channelMap, log 'AUDIT_PREPROCESSOR: Processing new message', and return the message. The Postprocessor script must increment the 'auditMessageCount' in the globalMap and log 'AUDIT_POSTPROCESSOR: Message processed. Count: ' followed by the incremented value.
